Incident Report (Cyber/Operational) — Kabushiki Kaisha Tsukikage (HSE Growth), 2026-06-03 10:30 JST
On 2026-06-02, our payroll vendor Kanashiro Payroll G.K. reported unauthorized SFTP access; one archive included employee rosters with names, work emails, and 個人番号 (My Number) for 142 employees, triggering APPI breach assessment.
The archive also contained a draft Board pack (“Project Hikari”) referencing a contemplated acquisition of Kabushiki Kaisha Hokaze Motors, with an indicative consideration range (approx. 28% of consolidated assets) and a draft 公開買付け開始予定日 of 2026-07-01; this is 未公表 and may constitute a 重要事実 under FIEA if/when the Board adopts a 決定事実.
As of this report, Mr. Daichi Morita (Board Secretary) confirms no Board resolution has been passed and no shares have been acquired; nonetheless, to avoid 選択的開示 and ensure issuer-relative materiality controls, treat all deal details as MNPI.
Containment: vendor credentials disabled; external access logs show 19 downloads from offshore IPs; no evidence of intrusion into Tsukikage systems; we have instructed Kanashiro Payroll G.K. to certify data deletion and provide chain-of-custody.
APPI response: under the amended 個人情報保護法 and PPC guidance, we will notify the Personal Information Protection Commission and affected employees within the prescribed period; all salary transfers have been re-tokenized through our internal gateway.
Disclosure controls: under HSE 適時開示規則, we will file via TD-Link only upon (i) Board 決議 establishing a 決定事実, (ii) 事実発生 requiring immediate disclosure, or (iii) rumor confirmation if necessary; a draft 臨時報告書 and 大量保有報告書 workflow are prepared but not submitted.
Fair disclosure: while the contractor is not an analyst/investor under the フェア・ディスクロージャー・ルール, the exposure presents a selective leak risk; all external communications are centralized with IR to prevent information asymmetry.
Blackout windows: officers and designated insiders are in a 取引禁止期間 until the scheduled Q1 決算発表 (2026-06-14 15:00 JST) and until any public announcement on “Project Hikari”; pre-clearance for employee stock purchase plan is suspended.
Public/unrelated items: on 2026-05-18 we publicly announced via TD-Link the Aoshima DC network alert (restored; no data loss), and on 2026-06-01 we filed our 有価証券報告書 via the East Capital Finance Bureau’s e-DISC portal; those disclosures are 公表済 and unrelated to this incident.
External factors (benign): Minato East Power Co.’s publicly posted maintenance for 2026-06-05 may affect the vendor’s region, but it is a non-issuer operational update and not an issuer disclosure matter.
Market chatter: social posts speculating on a “Hokaze tie-up” cite stale analyst blogs and do not reflect any 公表済事実; please refrain from comment beyond the approved holding statement.
Point of contact: Ms. Ayaka Nishi (CISO) csirt@tsukikage.example; investor inquiries ir@tsukikage.example; vendors must route incident details to thirdpartyrisk@tsukikage.example.
Next steps: complete PPC notice, issue employee notices, continue dark-web monitoring, finalize Board briefing on FIEA 重要事実 thresholds and TD-Link timing, and review vendor contracts for encryption-at-rest and breach notification SLAs.
